original_query: select * from (select * from emp where deptno = 10) as t where deptno + 5 > empno;
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM emp WHERE deptno = 10 AND deptno + 5 > empno;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated unnecessary subquery by combining the WHERE conditions into a single query
Combined multiple filter conditions into a single WHERE clause for more efficient filtering
